clues.clue: 'I'll Be There for You' by The Rembrandts opens this NBC comedy about six pals in New York.
'Movin' on Up' to a deluxe apartment is the theme of this 'All in the Family' spin-off.
'Making your way in the world today takes everything you've got' opens this Boston bar comedy.
'Thank you for being a friend' introduces this sitcom about four older women in Miami.
A rapped origin story 'born and raised' in West Philadelphia opens this Will Smith comedy.
clues.response: What is The Fresh Prince of Bel-Air?

clues.clue: The Gilligan's Island theme says the castaways set out on 'a three-hour' this.
The Brady Bunch theme calls it 'the story of a lovely' this.
The Flintstones theme promises 'we'll have a gay old' this.
The Cheers theme longs for a place 'where everybody knows your' this.
The Addams Family theme tells listeners to do this twice with their fingers.
This composer wrote the bouncy fanfare for 'The Simpsons,' first name Danny.
The eerie 'X-Files' theme is famous for being this kind of music, with no words.
The opening of 'SpongeBob SquarePants' begins by asking, 'Are you ready,' these?
The cello-driven 'Game of Thrones' main title was composed by Ramin, last name this.
The Mary Tyler Moore theme asks if she's 'gonna make it after' this word.
'Who lives in a pineapple under the sea?' opens this Nickelodeon cartoon.
'A horse is a horse, of course, of course' introduced this talking-equine comedy.
'Sunny Day, sweepin' the clouds away' opens this long-running PBS children's show.
This 90s ABC 'TGIF' comedy followed Cory Matthews and his teacher Mr. Feeny.
'Believe it or not, I'm walking on air' opened this comedy about a reluctant flying hero.
clues.response: What is The Greatest American Hero?

clues.clue: The duo who recorded the 'Friends' theme were this two-piece pop band.
The actor who sings the 'Fresh Prince' rap theme also stars in the show.
The Jeffersons and All in the Family were both created by this producer, first name Norman.
Modern streaming shows added a 'skip' button mainly to bypass these recurring opening songs.
The brief, wordless 'Office' (U.S.) theme is played mainly on this keyboard instrument.

final.clue: This sci-fi anthology's narrator and theme invited viewers into 'another dimension... a dimension of imagination.'
